evals.name: teleport-custom-overlay
evals.prompt: I need a custom full-screen overlay that escapes a parent with overflow:hidden, rendered at body level. How do I do this in Vue without Vuetify?

assertions.text: Recommends wrapping the overlay in <Teleport to="body">, notes the target must exist client-side, uses a ref(false) toggle driven SSR-safely, optionally wraps in <Transition>, and points animation CSS to design-scss; mentions Vuetify v-dialog/v-overlay as the default alternative

evals.name: suspense-async-loading
evals.prompt: How do I show a loading spinner while an async child component with top-level await in setup resolves?

assertions.text: Uses <Suspense> with #default (the async component) and #fallback (e.g. v-progress-circular), flags that Suspense is experimental, and notes it has no built-in error handling so an onErrorCaptured boundary in the parent is needed, plus SSR caveat that the server awaits and emits resolved content

evals.name: transitiongroup-list-reorder
evals.prompt: My v-for list animates items in and out, but when items reorder they jump instead of sliding. How do I fix this?

assertions.text: Identifies <TransitionGroup> with a *-move class for FLIP move transitions, requires a stable unique :key per child (not the index), sets position:absolute on leaving items so siblings shift, warns FLIP fails on display:inline, and defers the CSS class bodies to design-scss

evals.name: vuetify-dialog-not-builtin
evals.prompt: How do I open a confirmation dialog with a fade transition when the user clicks delete?

assertions.text: Routes to vuetify-components: recommends Vuetify's v-dialog (which already teleports and animates) rather than a raw Teleport/Transition, and does not hand-roll a built-in overlay for a standard dialog
